The Query Image displays a flower with large, broad petals that are light pink with darker pink veining and a prominent, intricate center. This morphology closely matches the visual features of the first example (class 81), which also shows a flower with similar petal shape, coloration, and central structure, despite differences in exact shade. </explanation>
